message:
perf(channel,sync): #[inline] Recv/RecvFuture::poll + semaphore AcquireFuture::poll

Channel receive futures and semaphore acquire futures are polled on every
event loop iteration — inlining their poll methods eliminates indirect-call
overhead in the core async path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
